failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Implement active cooling system and temperature monitoring

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction byproducts or fouling
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly flush system and monitor for pressure drops

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.378 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test cooling system efficiency by measuring temperature drop over 30 min at 120°C
Simulate blockage by introducing a known obstruction and monitor flow rate reduction
